languages.text: "Да, Ваша Светлость. Немедленно распоряжусь подготовить оборудование".
"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will order the equipment prepared at once."
languages.original_text: "Да, Ваша Светлость. Немедленно распоряжусь подготовить оборудование".

traits.locale_text: "Yes, Your Lordship. I shall make arrangements for the equipment at once."
"Yes, Your Lordship. I shall make arrangements for the equipment at once."
"Yes, Your Lordship. I shall order the equipment prepared at once."
"Yes, Your Lordship. I shall order the equipment prepared at once."

languages.text: "Ja, {mf|Eure Lordschaft|Eure Ladyschaft}! Ich lasse umgehend alles vorbereiten."
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your Lordship. I shall order the equipment prepared at once."

traits.locale_text: "Ja, {mf|Eure Lordschaft|Eure Ladyschaft}! Ich lasse umgehend alles vorbereiten."

languages.text: « Oui, Votre Seigneurie. Je vais ordonner qu'on prépare le matériel. »
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your Lordship. I shall order the equipment prepared at once."

traits.locale_text: « Oui, Votre Seigneurie. Je vais ordonner qu'on prépare le matériel. »

languages.text: «Sí, {mf|milord|milady}. Ordenaré la preparación del equipo de inmediato».
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your Lordship. I shall order the equipment prepared at once."

traits.locale_text: «Sí, {mf|milord|milady}. Ordenaré la preparación del equipo de inmediato».

languages.text: "Emredersiniz Lord Hazretleri. Ekipmanın derhâl hazırlanmasını emredeceğim."
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your Lordship. I shall order the equipment prepared at once."

traits.locale_text: "Emredersiniz Lord Hazretleri. Ekipmanın derhâl hazırlanmasını emredeceğim."

languages.text: “是，大人。我这就下令准备设备。”
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your Lordship. I shall order the equipment prepared at once."

traits.locale_text: “是，大人。我这就下令准备设备。”

languages.text: 「はい、殿。直ちに備えを命じます。」
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your Lordship. I shall order the equipment prepared at once."

traits.locale_text: 「はい、殿。直ちに備えを命じます。」
